creator: andy@neu.net
text:
I've been using Vbox on FreeBSD since it's been available.  I'm seeing 2 major problems now.

1. Over the last several months I have had instability causing the machine to lock up and requiring a hardware/power reset.  This occurs approx every 7-10 days (sometimes sooner).  I made the following changes but it did not fix the problem, only increased the length of time between freezes.

vfs.aio.max_buf_aio=8192
vfs.aio.max_aio_queue_per_proc=65536
vfs.aio.max_aio_per_proc=8192
vfs.aio.max_aio_queue=65536

2. Very recently (last several days) the mouse has stopped working in the guest several minutes after bootup.
I recompiled/installed VBox and VBox-kmod, but it didn't have any effect.  This is on a 12-current machine, with all source and ports synched and updated.  Guest is Opensuse Tumbleweed.
